query:
SELECT DISTINCT r1.room_id as "room_id!"
               FROM room_memberships r1
               INNER JOIN room_memberships r2 ON r1.room_id = r2.room_id
               WHERE r1.user_id = $1
               AND r2.user_id = $2
               AND r1.membership = 'join'
               AND r2.membership = 'join'
               LIMIT 20
